The D Sand perforations were isolated and an attempt to re-complete to the C Sand was unsuccessful.  The well is SI pending re-completion operations to the C Sand at a later date.  The tubing was replaced on 04/12/2012.  See Correction Report.

Rooster Petroleum, LLC. has successfully drilled and completed for production the VR 376 A005 well.  The well was spud on 04-11-12 and drilled to a TD of 4315' MD / 4230' TVD.  TD was reached on 04-19-12 w/a MW of 10.5 ppg WBM.

The well was completed as a single, gravel packed oil completion in the "S-2" Sand with perforations of 3982' - 3982' MD.  Completion operations were completed on 05-31-12.
